evals.prompt: Review the AGENTS.md file in this project and tell me if it's good enough for a new developer
evals.expected_output: A structured review with strengths, issues, and actionable recommendations

evals.prompt: I just wrote a README.md for my new project. Can you quality-check it?
evals.expected_output: A review comparing README.md against README best practices with newcomer-focused criticism

evals.prompt: audit the CLAUDE.md file - does it actually help Claude work with this codebase?
evals.expected_output: A review focused on whether the instructions are actionable for Claude specifically
